name: spoiti-lists
description: Your Spotify playlists and liked songs inside SpotiFLAC. Uses Spotify’s official API; lists refresh when you open them (home feed may cache a few minutes).
author: AlexRabbit

settings.label: Spotify Client ID
settings.description: From Spotify Developer Dashboard (Desktop app). Never put your Client Secret here.

settings.label: Redirect URI
settings.description: Must match Spotify app settings exactly (default is usually fine).

settings.label: Spotify login link
settings.description: Filled when you tap Connect (or Show last link). Select and copy this whole line into a browser.

settings.label: 1. Connect to Spotify
settings.description: Builds the Spotify login link and shows it (copy into a browser).

settings.label: Show last login link again
settings.description: Shows the same URL as step 1 without starting a new login (PKCE stays valid).

settings.label: Authorization code
settings.description: After Spotify redirects, paste the value of code= from the URL (or the whole spotiflac://… or https://… callback URL). Save the field, then tap Finish login.

settings.label: 2. Finish login
settings.description: Exchanges the code from SpotiFLAC or from the field above for tokens.

settings.label: Disconnect
settings.description: Clear Spotify login for this extension.
